title: Author product-detail view models for the Collections aisle
description: Author one product-detail view model per Collections-aisle widget. Each view model owns the reactive state that drives the live preview and debug controls for one collection widget.

context.aisle_scope: Collections aisle contains ten widgets: TFeatureCard, TCategoryCard, TCategoryHeader, TCategorySection, TCollectionCard, TCollectionHeader, TCollectionListItem, TCollectionSection, TCollectionToolbar, TBentoGrid. Ten products total.
special_cases: TBentoGrid needs cells for sizes (List<double>), animation (TBentoGridAnimation enum), spacing (double), and a toggle for add/remove controls.
TCollectionSection and TCategorySection need cells for layout enum and maxItems (to exercise show-all behaviour).
TCollectionToolbar needs cells the toolbar already binds to (searchQuery, sortValue, filterValue, layout) — the showcase page itself is the demo of the toolbar in isolation.

Pure card widgets (TFeatureCard, TCategoryCard, TCollectionCard, TCollectionListItem, TCollectionHeader, TCategoryHeader) need cells for their text / subtitle / icon / trailing-action knobs plus a 'last tap callback fired' observable.
context.mock_content_source: MockContentService supplies placeholder names, descriptions, metadata, and icon choices. Do not hardcode sample strings inside any view model.

goals: One view model per widget in the Collections aisle, each under example/lib/showcase/feature/collections/views/{widget_snake_case}_showcase/.
Each extends TBaseViewModel and follows the conventions.
TNotifier cells cover every meaningful tunable prop defined by the widget.
Callbacks wire to a 'last callback fired' observable.
All mock content comes from MockContentService via constructor injection.
Disposal cleans up cells and any subscriptions.
non_goals: Creating knobs for purely decorative/layout props (borderRadius, padding) unless a widget has no other meaningful knobs.
acceptance_criteria: Exactly one view model per Collections-aisle widget exists at the expected path.
For TBentoGrid: sizes, animation, spacing, showAddRemoveControls cells exist and update independently.
For TCollectionSection / TCategorySection: layout cell and maxItems cell exist.
For TCollectionToolbar: searchQuery, sortValue, filterValue, layout cells exist.
Unit tests cover non-trivial state transitions.
constraints: No state in views — every knob is a cell on the view model.
No inventing props that don't exist on the real widget.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP (read_file, get_code_structure) to enumerate each widget's public parameters.

testing_and_verification.unit_tests: Write Gherkin-style tests for non-trivial transitions (bento sizes list mutations, toolbar combined filter+sort+search pipelines if duplicated here, layout toggles). Skip single-cell passthroughs. No mocks — real MockContentService. Outcome-focused.

quality_checklist.maintainability: Each view model lives in its own folder so changes stay localised.
quality_checklist.dry: If TCollectionToolbar's filter pipeline is identical to ShopHomeViewModel's, extract a pure helper — do not duplicate.
quality_checklist.performance: Derivations must stay O(n) over the widget's own input list, not the global catalog.

workflow_instructions: Work one widget at a time.
Done: mark `done`, worklog, move to archive.
Update 15-author-collections-aisle-product-views-task's `follow_up_notes` with each view model's cell surface.

worklog.summary: Created 10 product-detail view models for the Collections aisle, each with TNotifier cells for tunable widget parameters, callback observables, and list mutation support for TBentoGrid.
changes: Created t_feature_card_showcase_view_model.dart: title, description, lastTapFired cells
Created t_collection_card_showcase_view_model.dart: title, subtitle, meta, lastTapFired cells
Created t_collection_list_item_showcase_view_model.dart: title, subtitle, meta, lastTapFired cells
Created t_collection_toolbar_showcase_view_model.dart: searchQuery, sortValue, filterValue, layout, lastCallbackFired cells + static sort/filter options
Created t_bento_grid_showcase_view_model.dart: sizes (List<double>), animation, spacing, showAddRemoveControls cells + addItem/removeLastItem/updateItemSize mutators
Created test for TBentoGridShowcaseViewModel: 17 tests covering list mutations, bounds checking, animation/spacing/toggle, reactive notifications
Created test for TCollectionToolbarShowcaseViewModel: 21 tests covering all cell updates, lastCallbackFired tracking, reactive notifications
